About Me

Dependable, Detail-Driven & Built for Global Remote Work

I am a Virtual Assistant, Project Manager, and Scrum Master from Nigeria — currently serving three active clients simultaneously across the United States and Southern Africa, with zero drop in quality or communication.

What sets me apart is my ability to create structure where none exists. When my client needed someone to research and qualify a global network of companies for a business expansion initiative, I built a custom tracking system from scratch, worked through the entire database with precision, and delivered results — 46 qualified prospects filtered from over 1,500 companies — without a CRM, without a template, and without being told exactly how. I figured it out, built the tools I needed, and got it done.

I currently serve as both Project Manager and Scrum Master for a seven-person international team, where I manage sprint planning, backlog prioritisation, stakeholder communication, and full team accountability using real Agile methodology in a paid environment.

Beyond client work, I teach foundational computer skills to over 300 students at Bloomstrides Montessori Academy — helping people who had never touched a computer build real confidence with tools like Microsoft Word and Excel. I also volunteer as Secretary to the Communications Director of my local church, where I coordinate communication between leaders, organise meetings, manage information across several channels, and support community service projects. These roles reflect something I believe deeply: knowledge expands a person's horizon, and good work should make people's lives better.

I am organised enough to manage complex moving parts across multiple workstreams, communicative enough to keep clients and teammates aligned, and resourceful enough to turn ambiguity into a clear plan of action.

If you are looking for someone who will show up, think ahead, and make your operation run better — I am that person.

C2 English — CEFR Highest Level (Versant by Pearson, GSE Score 88)
97+ Mbps primary connection with alternative internet and power backup
100% data accuracy maintained across 1,500+ researched profiles
Multi-timezone fluency — works seamlessly across WAT / EST / MST / PST

Projects

Live client work — real deliverables, real results.

Global Network Expansion Project

🏢 Career Advisory Board / infointerview.org 🌍 Remote (WAT / MST) 📅 Dec 2025 – Present 🎯 VA Role
  • Built an AI-powered research system using custom prompt sequences to evaluate companies in batches of 50, producing structured Yes / No / Unclear tables with confidence ratings for each entry.
  • Conducted deep-dive industry research that uncovered a critical insight: most companies hiring live chat agents do not post these roles publicly — they contract staffing intermediaries instead. This finding directly shaped the project's outreach strategy, redirecting focus toward identifying direct-hire companies such as TalentPop that bypass the intermediary model entirely.
  • Identified that South Africa receives significantly more US remote job opportunities than Nigeria or Ghana — used this intelligence to refocus geographic targeting and increase relevance for the Nigerian market.
  • Successfully filtered a full prospect list to 46 companies matching the defined target criteria, and developed personalised LinkedIn outreach message templates for each qualified contact.
  • Actively building a LinkedIn outreach strategy — identifying Nigerian employees at target companies and crafting informational interview messages to establish warm introductions.
  • Maintained a dual-tab Google Sheets tracker covering Company Research and Company Contacts, with weekly status reports delivered to the client.
Virtual Assistant Samples
Company Research Tracker — AI-Filtered Yes / No / Unclear
Live Google Sheets tracker showing AI-assisted company classification across hundreds of prospects.

Advanced LinkedIn search filters used to locate the right contacts at target organisations.

Regular video call updates presenting research progress and strategic recommendations.

infointerview.org — Website Development Project

● Ongoing
🏢 Career Advisory Board (BYU-Pathway Worldwide) 🌐 Product: infointerview.org 🎯 Project Manager & Scrum Master 🌍 Remote 📅 Jan 2026 – Present
infointerview.org is an independent project under development — the site is expected to go live in the coming weeks.
  • Assigned as the central Project Manager — all 7 team members across 5 countries funnel communications, blockers, and deliverables through Me.
  • Managing 2-week Agile sprints within a $200/sprint budget, coordinating a global team: content lead (South Africa), two technical developers (South Africa & Ghana), two product owners (South Africa), utility team member (Zimbabwe), and client team (USA).
  • Facilitating sprint planning, retrospectives, and backlog grooming — maintaining a sprint velocity tracker and Urgent/Important matrix in Google Workspace.
  • Delivered post-meeting recap emails after every client call to ensure full team alignment across time zones.
  • Led team formation activities including team name vote, domain purchase decision, and tool selection — coordinating 8 stakeholders across Nigeria, South Africa, Ghana, Zimbabwe, and the USA.
  • First professional Agile PM engagement in a real-budget, multi-country environment — demonstrating Scrum methodology from day one.
Scrum Master Agile / Sprint Planning Backlog Management Budget Tracking Cross-timezone Coordination Google Workspace Team Leadership
